name: Midir
desc: Knight in the service of Grannvale's House Jungby, used to with bow fighting.

name: Cross Knight
desc: Elite Cavaliers and Paladins that make up the main body of the Nordion army.

name: Alva
desc: Elite knight of Nordion and younger triplet brother of Eve and Eva.

name: Eva
desc: Elite knight of Nordion and the middle triplet brother of Eve and Alva.

name: Eve
desc: Elite knight of Nordion and the older triplet brother of Eva and Alva.

name: Cú Chulainn
desc: The son of the Lord of Sophara Castle in Isaach and a distant relative of Ayra.

name: Sigurd
desc: Chalphy's and Crusader Baldr's Heir. He's got a strong sense of justice.

name: Noish
desc: Dutiful knight of Chalphy. He is calm and serious, with a strong sense of honor.

name: Alec
desc: Knight of Chalphy with a personality playful and teasing but, yet, loyal.

name: Arden
desc: The strongest, humblest and most reliable foot knight of Sigurd of Chalphy.

name: Quan
desc: Leonster's Prince and Gáe Bolg's inheritor. Husband of Ethlyn and old friend Sigurd.

name: Finn
desc: A knight of Leonster, undyingly loyal to Quan and his family.

name: Ethlyn
desc: Sigurd's little sister and wife of Quan of Leonster.

name: Lex
desc: The youngest son of Langbalt, Duke of Dozel, heir of Neir and a hot-headed knight.

name: Azel
desc: Nobleman of House Velthomer of Grannvale and the younger half-brother of Duke Arvis

name: Midir
desc: Knight in the service of Grannvale's House Jungby, used to with bow fighting.

name: Aideen
desc: Sigurd's childhood friend and one of the two daughters of Duke Ring of Jungby.

name: Gandolf
desc: Elder son of King Batur of Verdane, and Kinbois and Jamke's brother.

name: Gerrard
desc: Bandit Cheif under Gandolf orders.

name: DiMaggio
desc: Bandit Cheif under Gandolf orders.

name: Arvis
desc: Velthomer's Duke and Azel's elder half-brother

name: Dew
desc: A little boy assigned to guard Aideen when they were realesed from Marpha.

name: Jamke
desc: Youngest Prince of Verdane, son of King Batur, and brother of Princes Kinbois and Gandolf.

name: Ayra
desc: The Isaachian princess master of the sword who fights for her homeland.

name: Deirdre
desc: Living descendant of Saint Maera and daughter of Prince Kurth of Grannvale

name: Kinbois
desc: Second son of King Batur of Verdane, and Gandolf and Jamke's brother.

name: Elliot
desc: A young upstart noble of Agustria, who fights for Lachesis's affections.

name: Sandima
desc: A member of the Loptyr Church, responsible for bewitching King Batur.

name: Eldigan
desc: Known as Lionheart, the King Lion of Agustria, he is the bravest paladin in Agustria.

name: Holyn
desc: The son of the Lord of Sophara Castle in Isaach and a distant relative of Ayra.

name: Lachesis
desc: The princess of Nordion and the younger half-sister of Eldigan.

name: Beowulf
desc: A mercenary from Conote alongside Voltz, his friend, and partner.

name: Lewyn
desc: Son of Queen Lahna of Silesse and a direct descendant of Crusader Sety.

name: Sylvia
desc: Traveling dancer who follows Lewyn and aids the war-suffering civilians.

name: Erinys
desc: One of the Four Heavenly Knights of Silesse and the younger sister of Mahnya.

name: Elliot
desc: A young upstart noble of Agustria, who fights for Lachesis's affections.

name: Phillip
desc: One of the retainers of Lord Boldor of Heirhein Castle.

name: Boldor
desc: Lord of Heirhein Castle, and the father of Elliot.

name: Macbeth
desc: Lord of Anphony's TownCastle.

name: Voltz
desc: Mercenary leader enlisted by Macbeth to defend Anphony.

name: Clement
desc: Lord of Mackily and the least ambitious lord of Agustria.

name: Zain
desc: Knight of Agustria under the orders of his liege King Chagall.

name: Chagall
desc: Arrogant and foolish king of Agustria and his father's murder suspect.

name: Tailtiu
desc: First daughter of Reptor of Friege and younger sister of Bloom of Friege.

name: Claude
desc: Duke of Edda Castle and priest of Bragi Church, of whom he's direct descendant.

name: Brigid
desc: Elder daughter of Duke Ring of Yngvi, twin sister of Edain, and half-sister of Andrei.

name: Eldigan
desc: Known as Lionheart, the King Lion of Agustria, he is the bravest paladin in Agustria.

name: Chagall
desc: Arrogant and foolish king of Agustria and his father's murder suspect.
